story_title: ConnectShyft Feature Flag and Availability Guardrails
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given ConnectShyft feature flags are disabled, when users access ConnectShyft API surfaces, then responses fail closed with controlled refusal semantics.
Given only selected sub-flags are enabled, when users access ConnectShyft capabilities, then only enabled capabilities are exposed and disabled capabilities are refused with explicit messaging.
Given ConnectShyft feature flags are disabled, when users access ConnectShyft UI surfaces, then the UI fails closed with controlled unavailable messaging.
Given only selected sub-flags are enabled, when users access ConnectShyft UI capabilities, then only enabled capabilities are exposed with explicit messaging for disabled capabilities.
